mapper.select: SELECT sentence_id, sentence_content, isbn, selected_date FROM sentences WHERE selected_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY sentence_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT sentence_id, sentence_content, isbn, selected_date FROM sentences WHERE selected_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY sentence_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT sentence_id, sentence_content, isbn FROM sentences WHERE selected_date IS NULL ORDER BY sentence_id ASC LIMIT 1
